docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY SHAW, SUSANNA AS TO DEFENDANT SEIF, LILI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-11-2010 BY JUDGE PRO TEM QUEENA C. HO. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S FATHER ALI SEIF PRESENT ON HER BEHALF AND INFORMS THE COURT THAT HIS DAUGHTER IS NOW LIVING IN NEW YORK. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHAW, SUSANNA AS TO DEFENDANT SEIF, LILI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHAW, SUSANNA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SEIF, LILI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
